title: Robust Flaky Croatian Cheddar Flatbread
description: A traditional Croatian dish featuring mature cheddar, perfect for a post-workout snack, this flatbread is bitter, flaky and ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly. It is made with kneaded dough and baked to perfection.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, salt, sugar, and yeast.
Gradually add olive oil and warm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a flat circle.
Sprinkle grated cheddar over the dough, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the dough over the cheese to form a crust.
Brush the crust with beaten egg and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before slicing.
